more.title: Can AI Help Solve South Africa’s Logistics Crisis?
more.description: South Africa’s logistics challenges have become one of the country’s biggest constraints on economic growth. Congested ports, rail bottlenecks, infrastructure limitations and supply chain disruptions continue to affect exporters, manufacturers, retailers and consumers alike. While long-term investment in infrastructure remains essential, businesses are increasingly asking a different question: can artificial intelligence (AI) help organisations operate [...]
